writer: Kinji Fukasaku, Hirô Matsuda, Yukio Mishima
actors: Akihiro Miwa, Eitarô Ozawa, Masakazu Tamura
plot: When the enigmatic woman Ryoko (played by Mishima-discovered female impersonator Akihiro Miwa) arrives at the Black Rose Mansion to perform, not only do the gentleman patrons seem smitten by her mystery and beauty, but past flames arrive to vie and die for her affections, as well. But things get even more complicated when the Mansion's manager and his wayward son both fall for the same dangerous woman.
